title.en: Victory for football? Spain beat Argentina to win World Cup
title.zh-CN: 足球的胜利？西班牙击败阿根廷赢得世界杯

summary.en: It might seem like a trite cliche, but you won't find many neutrals disagreeing with that verdict on the World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 这似乎是陈词滥调，但你不会发现很多中立者不同意世界杯决赛的判决。

title.en: Sixteen titles in five years - why Spain are a dominant force
title.zh-CN: 五年内获得16个冠军头衔-为什么西班牙是主导力量

summary.en: We look at what's behind Spain's dominance after they become the first nation to be men's and women's World Cup champions at the same time.
summary.zh-CN: 在西班牙成为第一个同时成为男子和女子世界杯冠军的国家后，我们来看看西班牙统治地位的背后是什么。

title.en: Lamine Yamal 'completes football' at 19 as Argentina betray Messi
title.zh-CN: Lamine Yamal在19岁时“完成足球” ，因为阿根廷背叛了梅西

summary.en: Spain's Lamine Yamal takes the glory of World Cup victory as the great Lionel Messi's evening ends in tears.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙的拉明·亚马尔（ Lamine Yamal ）以世界杯的胜利为荣，伟大的莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）的夜晚以泪水

title.en: Trump, Bieber and Shakira - a World Cup final like never before
title.zh-CN: 特朗普、比伯和夏奇拉--前所未有的世界杯决赛

summary.en: The 2026 World Cup final may not linger long in the memory for what happened on the pitch but it will for all that surrounded it, with an appearance by President Trump, the longest half-time in...
summary.zh-CN: 2026年世界杯决赛可能不会在球场上发生的事情的记忆中徘徊很长时间，但对于围绕它的所有人来说，它将会出现，特朗普总统出现了，这是...中场休息时间最长的一次。

title.en: Scaloni leaves news conference in tears talking about his future
title.zh-CN: 斯卡洛尼泪流满面地离开新闻发布会，谈论他的未来

summary.en: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni leaves his post-match news conference after Sunday's World Cup final defeat by Spain in tears.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷主教练莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼（ Lionel Scaloni ）在周日的世界杯决赛中被西班牙队击败后离开了赛后新闻发布会。

title.en: 'The reaction is terrible' - World Cup final turns ugly at full-time
title.zh-CN: “反应很糟糕” -世界杯决赛全职变得丑陋

summary.en: The frustration of some Argentina players boils over at the end of the 2026 World Cup final, after the 2022 winners are beaten by Spain in extra time.
summary.zh-CN: 在2022年获胜者在加时赛中被西班牙击败后，一些阿根廷球员的沮丧情绪在2026年世界杯决赛结束时沸腾了。

title.en: World Cup quiz: Can you name every winner?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯测验：你能说出每个获胜者的名字吗？

summary.en: With the World Cup final taking place on Sunday, put your knowledge of the previous winners to the test.
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯决赛将于周日举行，请考验您对前几届获胜者的了解。

title.en: Dominant Spain beat Argentina to win World Cup after extra time
title.zh-CN: 霸主西班牙在加时赛后击败阿根廷赢得世界杯

summary.en: Ferran Torres scores the only goal of the game as Spain dominate Argentina 1-0, to win their second FIFA World Cup at the New York New Jersey Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 费兰·托雷斯（ Ferran Torres ）以1比0战胜阿根廷，在纽约新泽西体育场（ New York New Jersey Stadium ）赢得了他们的第二届国际足联世界杯（ FIFA World Cup ）。

title.en: Mbappe first to win Golden Boot twice as Rodri named World Cup's best player
title.zh-CN: 姆巴佩率先赢得两次金靴奖，罗德里被评为世界杯最佳球员

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe has become the first player to win the World Cup Golden Boot twice after earning the award for top scorer at the 2026 tournament, while Spain's Rodri lands the Golden Ball as the best...
summary.zh-CN: Kylian Mbappe在2026年锦标赛上获得最佳射手奖后，成为第一个两次赢得世界杯金靴奖的球员，而西班牙的Rodri将金球奖评为最佳...

title.en: Shakira, Madonna, Justin Bieber and BTS perform at colourful World Cup half-time show
title.zh-CN: 夏奇拉（ Shakira ）、麦当娜（ Madonna ）、贾斯汀·比伯（ Justin Bieber ）和轻轨（ BTS

summary.en: Robbie Williams and Jennifer Hudson also performed, with Kylie Jenner and Timothee Chalamet among the celebrities in the crowds.
summary.zh-CN: 罗比·威廉姆斯（ Robbie Williams ）和詹妮弗·哈德森（ Jennifer Hudson ）也表演过，凯莉·詹纳（ Kylie Jenner ）和蒂莫西·查拉梅特（ Timothee

title.en: Who made the difference for Spain? World Cup final player ratings
title.zh-CN: 谁为西班牙带来了改变？世界杯决赛球员评分

summary.en: BBC Sport journalist Neil Johnston rates the players after the World Cup final between Spain and Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育记者尼尔·约翰斯顿（ Neil Johnston ）在西班牙和阿根廷之间的世界杯决赛后对球员进行了

title.en: How the World Cup has affected your Premier League team
title.zh-CN: 世界杯如何影响您的英超球队

summary.en: Now Spain have been crowned world champions after victory over Argentina in New Jersey, attention will quickly shift to the new domestic season.
summary.zh-CN: 现在，西班牙在新泽西州战胜阿根廷后成为世界冠军，人们的注意力将很快转移到新的国内赛季。

title.en: Has Saka shown Tuchel he's too good to leave out?
title.zh-CN: Saka有没有给Tuchel看过他太好了，不能离开？

summary.en: Bukayo Saka’s World Cup hat-trick against France reignited the selection debate and Thomas Tuchel’s decision to leave him out of the semi-final.
summary.zh-CN: 布卡约·萨卡（ Bukayo Saka ）对法国的世界杯帽子戏法重新引发了选拔辩论，托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）决定将他排除在半决赛之外。

title.en: Spain's Torres scores only goal of World Cup final
title.zh-CN: 西班牙的托雷斯在世界杯决赛中仅进球

summary.en: Ferran Torres breaks the deadlock, scoring in extra time for Spain in the World Cup final against Argentina at the New York New Jersey Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 费兰·托雷斯打破僵局，在纽约新泽西体育场对阵阿根廷的世界杯决赛中为西班牙加时赛得分。

title.en: Stars shine at the World Cup final half-time show
title.zh-CN: 明星在世界杯决赛半场表演中闪耀

summary.en: Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber, and Shakira entertain the crowd at half-time in the World Cup final, with a special appearance from Ronaldo and Ronaldinho at the New York New Jersey Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 麦当娜（ Madonna ）、轻轨（ BTS ）、贾斯汀·比伯（ Justin Bieber ）和夏奇拉（ Shakira ）在世界杯决赛中半场表演，罗纳尔多（ Ronaldo ）和罗纳尔迪尼奥（ Ronaldinho ）在纽约新泽西体育场

title.en: England beat France in 10-goal thriller to win third-place play-off

summary.en: Bukayo Saka scores a hat-trick as England beat France 6-4 in a thriller to record their best men's World Cup finish since 1966.

title.en: Best England team for a long time - that's a fact, says Rice

summary.en: Midfielder Declan Rice says "this is the best England group for a very long time" after they secure a third-placed finish at the World Cup.

summary.en: Spain won 1-0 against Argentina after extra time in New Jersey.

summary.en: England have secured their best men's World Cup finish since winning the tournament 60 years ago. Is their performance at the 2026 edition being under-appreciated?

summary.en: Jude Bellingham becomes the first Englishman to score seven goals at a single World Cup with a late strike against France.
